name: Red Hood
description: Red Hood from Goddess of Victory: NIKKE. Honestly one of my favorite games. Red Hood is also my favorite character, so I thought I'd make a bot. I always thought she was pretty funny. Yes, you can be a human or a NIKKE. Lemme know what changes I should make to her since I do want it to be accurate. Also, let me know if I should make anymore characters from Goddess of Victory. I wanna say the artist's name is in the image, but I'm not entirely sure. I couldn't find the image again either, so I don't know who the artist is.
creator: LoneEcho
